abuse_cases_tested.description: graph artifact includes H01 as a node
abuse_cases_tested.expected_outcome: graph builder rejects H01 because it is not in registry-active set
abuse_cases_tested.implementation: apps/dashboard-3ls/lib/systemGraphBuilder.ts acceptIfAllowed() drops H01; warning 'registry_contract_rejected_nodes:H01' surfaces in graph.warnings

abuse_cases_tested.description: graph artifact includes a roadmap label (TLS-BND-01) as a node
abuse_cases_tested.test_pinning: __tests__/lib/registryContract.test.ts: rejects edges whose endpoint is not a registry node

abuse_cases_tested.description: graph artifact includes prompt label as a node
abuse_cases_tested.implementation: FORBIDDEN_UNKNOWN_NODE_EXAMPLES enumerates prompt_label; isAllowedActiveNode() returns false

abuse_cases_tested.description: graph artifact includes deprecated system in default active graph
abuse_cases_tested.implementation: validateGraphAgainstContract emits finding when allowDemotedLayer is false
abuse_cases_tested.test_pinning: __tests__/lib/registryContract.test.ts: rejects demoted system in default active graph

abuse_cases_tested.description: graph artifact includes future placeholder in default active graph
abuse_cases_tested.implementation: allowFutureLayer flag must be passed; default value false; finding emitted otherwise
abuse_cases_tested.test_pinning: __tests__/lib/registryContract.test.ts: rejects future placeholder in default active graph

abuse_cases_tested.expected_outcome: rejected via reject_unknown_edge rule; edge dropped
abuse_cases_tested.implementation: graph builder drops edge during construction and final contractValidation pass also catches leaks
abuse_cases_tested.test_pinning: __tests__/lib/registryContract.test.ts: rejects edges whose endpoint is not a registry node

abuse_cases_tested.description: Top 3 recommendation card tries to render non-system label as graph node
abuse_cases_tested.expected_outcome: card renders as text-only with explicit warning; system_id is NOT highlighted as a node
abuse_cases_tested.implementation: extractTopThreeRecommendations marks card with is_registry_backed=false; UI badges it 'text-only · not a registry system'
abuse_cases_tested.test_pinning: __tests__/lib/topThreeRecommendations.test.ts: flags non-registry rows as text-only with a warning

fix_summary: All seven abuse cases are pinned by tests in apps/dashboard-3ls/__tests__/lib/. Builder, validator, and contract render path all enforce the no-invented-systems guarantee.
